MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. PLAINTIFF ROCK SOLID GELT LIMITED'S Amended Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement And Enter Judgment With Atty's Fees is off calendar. Duplicate entry. Judge: Curtis E. A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
David A. Hosilyk, Esq. of Fine Boggs Perkins LLP, Tel. 650.712.7541, for Plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ROCK SOLID GELT LIMITED's Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement And Enter Judgment With Attorney Fees is Granted. No opposition filed. Order and Judgment signed in open Court. Judge: Curtis E. A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.
